facts.title: AmbiSEC IoT Security Co-Processor — dual-domain SE | AmbiSecure
facts.desc: AmbiSEC is a dual-domain IoT security co-processor: MCU runs the app, the crypto domain holds keys, signs, verifies, and authenticates secure OTA.
facts.h1: A second silicon domain for connected devices — keys never reach application firmware.
